findings.description: PascalCase class names `StatusCodeConvertHandler` and `GlobalErrorHandler` appear in s3's XML code example but are absent from s3's hints array. A user asking about these handlers would not be routed to s3.
findings.source_evidence: Source XML: `<component class="nablarch.fw.handler.StatusCodeConvertHandler" />` and `<component class="nablarch.fw.handler.GlobalErrorHandler" />` both appear in the handlerQueue configuration under the 'アプリケーションの実行と初期化処理' section.
